data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for click-to-order attribution decision with window logic.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'Click-to-order attribution decision with window logic' requirement. However, the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or data related to this attribution logic, nor does it confirm that the system correctly attributes conversions based on the defined window. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality, but without concrete evidence or API reads, the validation remains inconclusive.
gaps: No evidence of click-to-order attribution decision with window logic.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
